special_mechanics.name: Shaman Spells
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a Shaman character with 26 different spells. Spells include terrain-altering abilities like Landbridge (raises sea floor to create bridges), Tornado (creates cyclone to destroy buildings), weather effects (storms), and volcanic eruptions. Some spells are single-use, others regenerate based on follower count.

special_mechanics.name: Terrain Deformation
special_mechanics.description: Dynamic terrain manipulation system allowing real-time structure building and landscape alteration. Terrain topology is toroidal but locally projected onto a sphere for planetary illusion.

special_mechanics.name: Unit Movement & Combat
special_mechanics.description: Multiple unit types (Brave, Warrior, Firewarrior, Preacher, Spy) with different movement capabilities and combat properties. Shamans are physically weaker but can cast spells and be reincarnated.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Source is encyclopedia entry describing gameplay mechanics and design rather than technical physics documentation. No quantitative movement, gravity, or jump parameters are documented. Game is real-time strategy with emphasis on spell casting and terrain deformation rather than character platforming physics.
